Intraday post (08/Sept)

Monthly post:

SEPTEMBER - Monthly & Weekly post (02-05/Sept)

Weekly post:

Zomma supply - Weekly post (08-12/Sept)

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

The speed profile draws a short fly pattern, with heavily negative net speed exposure, and right-tail heavy above the centroid of 6477.01 - 6485.80 area.The centroid is kinda magnetic during the day, and spot needs to break above 6504.57 in order to get the right-tailish spot-up/vol-up vacuum towards 6520.

In order to reach the pivot during RTH (assuming SPX opens within the centroid, call skew needs to go up by 57.38%, and in order to break the upside pivot, and there another 40.32% is needed to be vacuumed into the right-tail towards 6520-6530 range, only to revert back.

After 2PM the 6496 line is a local pivot. Spot either gets pinned to 6500, or to 6480.

To the downside, it is the 6475.86 line that confirms a breakout of the centroid’s magnetic field. Here a 19.18% put skew increase is enough to take the spot down to 6451, and to get 6413.26 (as daily max), you need to see persistent bid on put side.

OptionsDepth Positioning

(Description is here)(to sign up, use ‘ODALMA’ for 10% discount)

So the market’s main bet is a right-tailish upward gamma squeeze then reversion back to the centroid.The secondary is the pin at the centroid, and only the third one is the retest of downside, but market bets rather on 6451, than 6413.26 to retest.
